channel.title: System on jpnt website

item.title: Xdg Desktop Portals
item.description:
TODO: keep it simple, what, why and how.

Still a lot todo!

XDG

TODO: write in plain english. formal

XDG: X desktop group. Now known as freedesktop.

project to work on interoperability and shared base technology for free-software desktop environments for the X Window System (X11) and Wayland on Linux and other Unix-like operating systems

not a formal standards body

founded by Havoc Pennington, a GNOME developer working for Red Hat in March 2000. Widely used open-source Desktop projects, such as GNOME, KDE’s Plasma Desktop, and Xfce, are collaborating with the freedesktop.org project
